_instructions: Visual identity for video and graphic content. Read by instagram-reel-script-writer, instagram-caption-writer (for carousel visual notes), infographic-designer, and carousel-copy-writer. Defines the creator's real shooting environments, B-roll universe, on-screen text style, and editing rhythm.

talking_head_setups: [SETUP 1 — e.g. 'Direct to camera, desk background (laptop + minimal setup visible)']
[SETUP 2 — e.g. 'Walking and talking outdoors — conveys thinking-in-motion, less polished = more credible']
[SETUP 3 — e.g. 'Standing at whiteboard or notebook for framework explanations']

screen_content: [SCREEN B-ROLL 1 — e.g. 'AI tool interface with prompt visible']
[SCREEN B-ROLL 2 — e.g. 'LinkedIn post draft or client content draft on screen']
[SCREEN B-ROLL 4 — e.g. 'DM thread (blurred names) showing a response']
hands_and_objects: [HANDS B-ROLL 1 — e.g. 'Typing at laptop — tight shot, just hands']
[HANDS B-ROLL 2 — e.g. 'Writing in a notebook — framework sketch, bullet list']
[HANDS B-ROLL 3 — e.g. 'Scrolling phone — LinkedIn feed, DMs']
environmental: [ENV B-ROLL 1 — e.g. 'Over-shoulder at screen (establishes work context)']
[ENV B-ROLL 2 — e.g. 'Wide shot of desk setup (used once for establishing shot)']

on_screen_text.style: [DESCRIBE TEXT STYLE — e.g. 'Bold, clean typeface. White text on dark bar, or large centre text on key phrases.' OR 'Minimal — single word or short phrase, high contrast']
on_screen_text.what_to_show: [DESCRIBE — e.g. 'The mechanism name, the number, or the contrarian claim. Never subtitles. Never transcription.' OR 'Key word only — appears for 1.5–3 seconds per phrase']
on_screen_text.what_not_to_show: [e.g. 'Do not transcribe what is being said. No decorative or handwritten fonts. No emojis unless creator requests.']
on_screen_text.capitalisation: [ALL CAPS for emphasis / Title Case / lowercase]

editing_rhythm.talking_head_cut_frequency: [e.g. 'Jump cut every 3–5 seconds' OR 'Slower cuts — 5–8 seconds — for a more authoritative feel']
editing_rhythm.broll_timing: [e.g. 'B-roll timed to spoken emphasis — cut to screen recording when naming the tool or result']
editing_rhythm.transitions: [e.g. 'Clean cuts only. No swipes, fades, or zoom effects.' OR 'No unnecessary transitions']
editing_rhythm.music: [e.g. 'Lo-fi ambient or none — never trending audio that pulls focus' OR 'No music — silence reads as confidence' OR 'Subtle instrumental only']

carousel_design_notes.slide_style: [DESCRIBE — e.g. 'Dark background with white text and single accent color for numbers. Minimal. No stock imagery.' OR 'Clean white with bold typography and accent blocks']

infographic_style.color_approach: [e.g. 'On-brand palette only. No gradients. High contrast.' OR 'Minimal — 2 colors max per infographic']
infographic_style.icon_style: [e.g. 'Line icons only. No filled or cartoon icons.' OR 'No icons — text-only with strong typography']

what_not_to_suggest: Stock footage of diverse teams smiling at laptops
Trending audio that doesn't fit the brand
Zoom transitions or whip cuts for dramatic effect
